text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital isn't looking well, so I take her to
the infirmary to get some rest.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Please excuse me while I get a little rest. Good
night...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
What the... Where am I? Have I been reborn into
another world?!

text_block_list.name: Self A
text_block_list.text:
Close! You haven't been reborn, but copied into
multiple selves instead!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Whoa! You're me! Like an actual real copy! And there's more of me over there!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wait, so all these windows floating in mid-air are
showing what the other Digitans are seeing?

text_block_list.name: Self A
text_block_list.text:
That's right. So, what's the first thing we should
do now that we're more than one?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Easy! Go to an Umamusume concert!

text_block_list.name: Self A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... That way, I can see the performers from
multiple angles!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll see the whole venue—from the back to the
front and center, from the left seats to the right!
Long shots, mid shots, medium close-ups!
Ohhhhh, have mercy!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And I'll have my own individual view from on
stage! First-person multi-angled perspective
concerts are the way of the future!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: My eyes... I have all the eyes!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wait, what? Was it all just a dream?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But the memory of that concert is still fresh in my
mind! Oohoohoo... Time for a replay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital seems to be back in good spirits
and full of energy.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Let's put one of us on training, one reviewing
albums, one perusing my zines, one on homework,
one writing manuscripts, one organizing merch...
If we split everything up, it'll all be done before
you can say Horsegirl!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's see. I'll go to training, and you—

text_block_list.name: Self A
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I wanna go train! Then I'll get to sneak
glances at all the Umas' fresh faces while I work!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Okay. In that case, I'll switch to writing the
manusc—

text_block_list.name: Self B
text_block_list.text:
Wait! I'm brimming with pathos that I want to put
to the page. Would you let me do it instead?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Agh, why is this so hard to divvy up?! Honestly, I
want to do everything!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh... I guess it was a dream...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... I feel like I came face-to-face with my
own greed...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After being toyed with in her own dream, Agnes
Digital fails to recover.
